/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/comp2113.dir/comp2113.cpp.o CMakeFiles/comp2113.dir/ui/ui_ux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/comp2113.dir/user_save_system/user_save_system.cpp.o -o comp2113  /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurses.tbd /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libform.tbd
